title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
title_es: La Casa Blanca pide a OpenAI retrasar el lanzamiento de GPT-5.6
bajada: La administración Trump solicitó a OpenAI que lance GPT-5.6 de forma limitada, solo con partners seleccionados, en lugar de al público general por preocupaciones de seguridad. Este movimiento marca la primera intervención regulatoria directa sobre un lanzamiento de modelo de IA.
bajada_en: The Trump administration requested OpenAI to launch GPT-5.6 in limited form to select partners rather than the general public due to safety concerns. This marks the first direct regulatory intervention on an AI model release.

title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
summary: The Trump administration, apprehensive of potential security issues, has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5.6. The Information reported that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees Wednesday in a company Q&A that it would release GPT-5.6 in limited preview form - granting access only to a small group of […]
title_es: OpenAI retrasará GPT-5.6 tras solicitud de Trump
bajada: OpenAI confirmó que lanzará GPT-5.6 en formato de preview limitado en respuesta a preocupaciones de seguridad expresadas por la administración Trump. El CEO Sam Altman comunicó a empleados que la estrategia será gradual en lugar de un lanzamiento abierto inmediato.
bajada_en: OpenAI confirmed it will launch GPT-5.6 in limited preview format in response to safety concerns from the Trump administration. CEO Sam Altman told employees the strategy will be gradual rather than an immediate open release.

title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.
title_es: Patronus AI recauda $50M para testing de agentes de IA
bajada: La startup Patronus AI, fundada por ex-investigadores de Meta, levantó $50 millones para construir "mundos digitales" que permitan hacer stress-testing de agentes de IA. El funding refleja la demanda creciente por herramientas de validación de agentes en producción.
bajada_en: Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, raised $50M to build "digital worlds" for stress-testing AI agents. The funding reflects growing demand for agent validation tools in production environments.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos mess is only getting worse
summary: It's been two weeks since Anthropic took its Mythos-class models offline after a Friday evening ultimatum from the Trump administration. The company sprang into action immediately, sending a barrage of executives to Washington, DC. But updates have been suspiciously lacking, with no resolution in sight. Anthropic declined to comment multiple times this week about the […]
title_es: Crisis en Anthropic: modelos Mythos permanecen offline
bajada: Anthropic mantiene sus modelos Mythos offline dos semanas después de un ultimátum de la administración Trump, sin comunicación clara sobre cuándo se resolverá la situación. La compañía ha enviado ejecutivos a Washington pero los detalles del conflicto siguen siendo opacos.
bajada_en: Anthropic keeps its Mythos models offline two weeks after a Trump administration ultimatum with no clear timeline for resolution. The company sent executives to Washington but details of the conflict remain opaque.

title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
title_es: Ejecuta un servidor vLLM en HF Jobs con un comando
bajada: Hugging Face simplifica el despliegue de modelos LLM permitiendo ejecutar servidores vLLM directamente desde su plataforma con un único comando. Esta integración reduce significativamente la fricción para developers que quieren servir modelos en producción.
bajada_en: Hugging Face simplifies LLM deployment by allowing developers to run vLLM servers directly from their platform with a single command. This integration significantly reduces friction for those looking to serve models in production.

title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.
title_es: Claude gana terreno a ChatGPT entre usuarios de pago
bajada: Datos muestran que Claude de Anthropic está conquistando cada vez más usuarios que pagan por IA, un mercado dominado históricamente por ChatGPT. Este desplazamiento sugiere que la preferencia de usuarios valida la estrategia de seguridad de Anthropic.
bajada_en: Data shows Claude is increasingly winning paid AI users, a market historically dominated by ChatGPT. This shift suggests user preference validates Anthropic's safety-focused strategy.

title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.
title_es: General Intuition invierte $320M en entrenar IA con videojuegos
bajada: General Intuition recaudó $320 millones para escalar modelos de IA entrenados con millones de horas de gameplay, apostando que datos de acción pueden ayudar a desarrollar "intuición" más cercana a la humana. Esta aproximación explora un nuevo paradigma de entrenamiento para agentes.
bajada_en: General Intuition raised $320M to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting that action data can help develop more human-like "intuition". This approach explores a novel training paradigm for agents.

title: Apple to skip high-end M6 Mac chips in favor of AI-focused M7 line
title_es: Apple salta M6 y lanza línea M7 enfocada en IA
bajada: Apple descartó los chips de alto rendimiento M6 para lanzar directamente la línea M7 (M7 Pro, M7 Max, M7 Ultra) optimizada para IA. Este movimiento de producto refleja la prioridad de Apple en integración de capacidades de IA en hardware.
bajada_en: Apple skipped high-end M6 chips to launch directly to M7 lineup (M7 Pro, M7 Max, M7 Ultra) optimized for AI. This product move reflects Apple's priority on AI capability integration in hardware.

title: What happened after 2k people tried to hack my AI assistant
title_es: Análisis: qué pasó cuando 2K personas intentaron hackear mi IA
bajada: Un desarrollador documentó los intentos de ataque a su asistente de IA durante una competencia de hacking, revelando patrones comunes de exploits y vulnerabilidades. El análisis proporciona insights valiosos sobre seguridad de aplicaciones de IA en el mundo real.
bajada_en: A developer documented attack attempts on his AI assistant during a hacking competition, revealing common exploit patterns and vulnerabilities. The analysis provides valuable insights into real-world AI application security.

title: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
summary: Hi HN, Nick here. We’re launching OpenKnowledge (https://openknowledge.ai/), a “what you see is what you get” markdown editor that has direct integrations with Claude, Codex, and other agents. Available as MacOS app or Web UI+CLI. Fully free/local and OSS.We built this because we wanted a Notion-like experience for writing and sharing markdown files across our team. Obsidian is the best alternative we tried, but found it doesn’t have a true WYSWIG UI and it didn’t integrate well with Claude/Codex outside of community plugins.So we built OpenKnowledge. It takes shape as:1. A MacOS app with a file navigator, the WYSIWYG editor, and link explorer.2. Integrations with the Claude, Codex, and Cursor desktop apps. The agents can open an OpenKnowledge editor within their embedded web browsers for a side-by-side experience.3. Built-in mcps, skills, and RAG for LLM-wiki and “AI Second Brain” scenarios + spec writing4. An embedded terminal and CLI for TUI-first usersOSS stack includes: Tiptap/prosemirror, CodeMirror, yjs (CRDT), Electron (MacOS app), Orama, remark/rehype/micromark/mdast, @pierre/treesOn the architecture side, the interesting eng. challenges included:1. A pipeline to convert ProseMirror to markdown in a bidirectional lossless way. ProseMirror uses ASTs, which are not designed to have byte-fidelity.2. A dual-observer CRDT to keep the ProseMirror and markdown state in-sync.The CRDT + git also power a collaborative experience that shows what Agents are doing in the markdown, have undo/redo, and version history. The “Share” and cloud-sync functionality are geared for team collaboration. They feel “no-code” but leverage git/GitHub under the hood, which also means data stays fully private.In that spirit, we made OpenKnowledge open source for anybody who’s curious or who’d like to contribute.We’re actively thinking about plugins/extensibility and what’s next. If you have suggestions or feedback, would love to hear it.Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=4
title_es: OpenKnowledge: alternativa open-source a Notion/Obsidian con IA
bajada: Se lanzó OpenKnowledge, un editor markdown WYSIWYG open-source con integraciones nativas para Claude y otros agentes de IA. La herramienta ofrece una alternativa gratuita y local a plataformas propietarias, con CLI y apps nativas.
bajada_en: OpenKnowledge launched as an open-source WYSIWYG markdown editor with native Claude and AI agent integrations. The tool offers a free, local alternative to proprietary platforms with CLI and native apps.

title: Why current LLM costs are not sustainable
title_es: Análisis: los costos actuales de LLMs no son sostenibles
bajada: Un análisis profundo examina por qué los costos operacionales de LLMs en escala no son económicamente sostenibles en el largo plazo. El artículo explora las implicaciones para el futuro del modelo de negocios de IA.
bajada_en: An in-depth analysis examines why LLM operational costs at scale are not economically sustainable long-term. The article explores implications for the future of AI business models.

title: Anthropic Thinks Its Own Success Is Key to Making AI Safe
summary: Anthropic's critics argue it's rapidly accumulating power. The company says that's what responsible AI development looks like.
title_es: Anthropic: su éxito es clave para una IA segura
bajada: Anthropic argumenta que su crecimiento y poder concentrado es necesario para asegurar desarrollo responsable de IA, posición que sus críticos cuestionan. El artículo analiza la tensión entre centralización y seguridad en la industria de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic argues its growth and concentrated power is necessary for responsible AI development, a position critics question. The article analyzes the tension between centralization and safety in AI industry.

title: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better?
title_es: Investigación: qué tokens predicen mejor los modelos híbridos
bajada: Nuevo paper de Allen AI explora las diferencias en capacidad de predicción de tokens entre arquitecturas híbridas y modelos tradicionales. El resultado proporciona insights para optimizar diseño de modelos.
bajada_en: New Allen AI paper explores token prediction differences between hybrid architectures and traditional models. Results provide insights for optimizing model design.

title: Showcase: geolocating a dashcam video without GPS, only from the footage [P]
summary: Sharing a project I have been working on called Third Eye. It does visual geolocation. Given a video, it figures out where it was filmed using only the image content, and draws the route on a map.Pipeline in short:per frame place recognition against a street imagery indexa trajectory search that stitches the frames into one coherent patha geometric verification step to catch false matchesper frame confidence so weak frames are flagged, not fakedI ran it on real dashcam footage and it traced the route quite well. Cross domain matching like this is genuinely hard, so a fair amount of the work went into making it honest about uncertainty.Keen to hear feedback on the matching and trajectory side.Video Demo:https://youtu.be/U3sItFlvq6E?si=-KJrwb0gSlk-GxVHThe Index was covering a 12KM2Area around NYC.submitted by/u/Ok-Apricot956[link][comments]
title_es: Third Eye: geolocalizar videos sin GPS solo con visión
bajada: Un proyecto demuestra geolocalización visual de videos de dashcam sin datos de GPS, usando place recognition y búsqueda de trayectorias. La técnica combina computer vision y matching cross-domain para mapear ubicaciones con incertidumbre honesta.
bajada_en: A project demonstrates visual geolocation of dashcam videos without GPS data using place recognition and trajectory search. The technique combines computer vision and cross-domain matching to map locations with honest uncertainty.

title: How're you deploying LLMs in production now-a-days? What's the best and most affordable way? [D]
summary: I've been developing an AI product using LLM APIs (from OpenRouter) but want to deploy an open-source LLM in my own Prod env. which I can control.Few reasons behind this are:- I wanna own the complete stack around my product.- Second I wanna fine-tune the model around my usecase.So, what's the most affordable but a good platform for this? I'm not an AI engineer so don't wanna stuck in CUDA or Transformers hell, anything which can give me a straight path towards my private deployment.Thanks,submitted by/u/Necessary_Gazelle211[link][comments]
title_es: Discusión: cómo desplegar LLMs en producción de forma asequible
bajada: Discusión en comunidad sobre opciones más accesibles para desplegar modelos open-source en producción sin necesidad de expertise profundo en CUDA. Refleja la demanda de developers por herramientas de despliegue más simples.
bajada_en: Community discussion on accessible options for deploying open-source models in production without deep CUDA expertise. Reflects developer demand for simpler deployment tools.
